Studio Operating System

Sharper routing, faster recall, better sessions.

Dex-Gear turns scattered product notes into a focused reference library for audio interfaces, controllers, synths, and Ableton workflows.

Browse the Library Open MOTU Guide
12+ gear references
3 lanes hardware, DAW, workflow
Zero fluff practical setup notes only
Featured Stack

MOTU, Ableton, performance control, and hybrid routing.

The site now leans into a cleaner editorial dashboard feel: crisp surfaces, glass panels, and your violet-teal-lime palette used with restraint instead of a full neon wash.

Low-latency monitoring CueMix and routing Controller workflows
Dex Focused notes for repeatable setups
Gear Hardware context without hunting manuals

Library

Reference pages by device and workflow

Each entry opens into the redesigned reading shell, with clearer hierarchy for long-form notes, specs, and setup steps.

DAW

Ableton Live

Ableton Live is a digital audio workstation for music production, creation, and performance.

Open notes
Modular

ROLI Seaboard M

ROLI Seaboard M — 24-key MPE controller with a silicone Keywave surface enabling 5 dimensions of expressive touch.

Open notes
Synth

Hydrasynth Explorer

ASM Hydrasynth Explorer — portable digital synthesizer with polyphonic aftertouch, wavetable morphing, and a 32-slot modulation matrix.

Open notes
Mixer

Launch Control XL Mk2

Novation Launch Control XL Mk2 — dedicated mixing surface with 8 faders, 16 assignable knobs, and 24 pads for Ableton Live.

Open notes
Performance

Push 1

Ableton Push 1 — hands-on instrument for step sequencing, melodic note input, clip launching, and deep device control inside Ableton Live.

Open notes
Controller

Knobbler

Max for Live device for advanced MIDI control.

Open notes
Interface

Motu Ultralite-mk3 Hybrid

Hybrid audio interface for professional music production.

Open notes
Guide

Launchkey 37 Mk3

Novation Launchkey 37 Mk3 — 37-key keyboard controller with deep Ableton integration, Scale Mode, Chord Modes, and a 5-pin MIDI output for hardware-to-hardware control.

Open notes
Guide

Roland VT-3

Roland VT-3 Voice Transformer — compact vocal processor with 9 voice characters, built-in USB audio interface, and MIDI control for vocoder pitch and preset recall.

Open notes
Guide

Shure SM58

Shure SM58 — industry-standard dynamic cardioid microphone for vocal recording and live performance.

Open notes
Guide

Yamaha HS7

Yamaha HS7 — bi-amplified studio reference monitor with a flat response designed to expose mix problems rather than flatter them.

Open notes
Guide

Yamaha P-225

Yamaha P-225 — 88-key digital piano with GHC graded action, CFX concert grand voice, and USB MIDI for use as a class-compliant controller in Ableton.

Open notes

Built for fast lookups, cleaner routing decisions, and practical studio recall.
